title: Giant Snowy Tree
description: This simple mod adds a giant snowy tree to the cold biomes.
body:
### Giant Snowy Tree

**This simple mod adds a giant snowy tree to the cold biomes.**
![Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f41cf5a03b0fd4d78a3cfef450b9ef2f34d1190a.jpeg)



- The terrain around the snowy tree is designed to blend naturally with the biomes.
- Perfect spot to build a cozy snowy base nearby
- There is a small hidden room inside the tree
  
This mod is also part of the combined ''Giant Natural Additions'' mod.
